nodes.name: Poll every 10 min
nodes.notes: Polling chosen over Notion webhooks because Notion's native webhooks are limited. 10-min poll = 144 executions/day = well within n8n self-hosted free tier.

nodes.name: Notion: Get Ready Deals
nodes.notes: Notion deal database must have: Status (select) with 'Ready to Blast' option, Blasted (checkbox), Asset Class (select/multi-select), Market (text), Price (number), Deal Type (select), Summary URL (url), Address (text — internal only)

nodes.name: Notion: Mark Blasted
nodes.notes: Prevents re-firing on next 10-min poll. Deal page now shows Blasted=true with timestamp.

meta.description: Polls Notion Deal Inventory every 10 min. Deals marked Status='Ready to Blast' AND Blasted=false get pushed to the Match Engine webhook, then flagged Blasted=true.
notion_database_required_fields: Status (select) — options: Draft, Ready to Blast, Blasted, Under Contract, Closed
Asset Class (multi-select) — SFR, MFR 2-4, MFR 5+, Commercial, Land, Mixed-Use, NNN, MHP
Deal Type (select) — Wholesale, Subject-To, Seller Finance, Hybrid, Novation
Summary URL (url) — link to deal package (deals.termsforsale.com/...)
Address (rich_text) — internal only, never sent pre-gate
env_vars_required: NOTION_DEAL_INVENTORY_DB_ID — Notion database ID for TFS Deal Inventory
